description_long: This combat tactical vehicle features a robust, angular body with a matte green finish and reinforced armor plating covering the entire exterior. The vehicle is equipped with four large, off-road tires with deep treads, designed for enhanced traction and durability. The front section is sloped and houses a pair of visible weapon mounts above the hood, while the rear compartment is slightly raised and features a yellow hatch. The cabin is open on the sides, revealing a utilitarian interior with visible seating and control mechanisms. The vehicle's design emphasizes protection and mobility, with thick, faceted panels and minimal exposed surfaces. Distinctive orange-yellow panels are present on the roof and rear, adding visual contrast to the otherwise military green body.
description: A heavily armored, angular green combat vehicle with large off-road tires, visible weapon mounts, and orange-yellow roof panels.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sloped armored nose, dual weapon mounts above the hood, and rugged front tires.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the open cabin, interior seating, and the raised rear compartment with a yellow hatch.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the orange-yellow roof panel, rear armor, and the wide stance of the vehicle.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the open cabin, interior details, and rear compartment.
attribute_weapon_mounts: Two weapon mounts visible above the hood at the front of the vehicle.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, angular, sloped armor plating; reinforced panels on all sides.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid matte green with orange-yellow accent panels; no camouflage pattern visible.
attribute_tire_type: Four large off-road tires with deep, aggressive tread pattern; appear reinforced for rugged terrain.
